content:
Hi devs, this was a lot of set up and it just feels like maybe it could be better? Because to get to this point (making a lot of embryos) requires suffering through lots of enemy dmg.

Could you do something to help this out? Maybe help bleed or give 24 devour in her exalt in Caro or....something else (no Thais please ...otherwise the solution is always put Thais in)

Thank you!
